scripts.build:binary: bun run build:frontend && bun build bin/server.ts --compile --minify --sourcemap --outfile dist/watcher
scripts.build:binary:linux: bun run build:frontend && bun build bin/server.ts --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/watcher-linux-x64
scripts.build:binary:mac: bun run build:frontend && bun build bin/server.ts --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/watcher-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:binary:windows: bun run build:frontend && bun build bin/server.ts --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/watcher-windows-x64.exe
scripts.release: bun run build:binary:linux && bun run build:binary:mac && bun run build:binary:windows && mkdir -p dist/release && gzip -ck dist/watcher-linux-x64 > dist/release/watcher-linux-x64.gz && gzip -ck dist/watcher-darwin-arm64 > dist/release/watcher-darwin-arm64.gz && gzip -ck dist/watcher-windows-x64.exe > dist/release/watcher-windows-x64.exe.gz
scripts.verify: bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun test
